headline: Efekta Education Group partners with ECC Co., Ltd. to revolutionise English language education in Japan
summary: Efekta Education Group has announced a landmark partnership with one of Japan's leading language and corporate education providers, ECC Co., Ltd. On July 1st, ECC will launch ECC Online Hyper Lessons, a cutting-edge English-learning solution, powered by Efekta's world-class education technology.

content.title: Efekta Education Group partners with ECC Co., Ltd. to revolutionise English language education in Japan
content.summary: Efekta Education Group has announced a landmark partnership with one of Japan's leading language and corporate education providers, ECC Co., Ltd. On July 1st, ECC will launch ECC Online Hyper Lessons, a cutting-edge English-learning solution, powered by Efekta's world-class education technology.

thumbnail.caption: Powering the next generation of education. (PRNewsfoto/Efekta Education Group)

headline: Kinsta Logs Record Year as Top Choice for Serious WordPress Businesses, With 60% Customer Growth, New Executive Hires and a Platform Buildout
summary: LOS ANGELES, March 31, 2026--Kinsta, a leading managed hosting provider for WordPress, today announced milestones in a record year for the company. Building on its recent recognition as the #1 web hosting platform in G2’s 2026 Best Software Awards, Kinsta saw more than 60% customer growth year-over-year, made two senior executive hires, expanded its partner programs and made significant platform improvements for agencies and enterprise teams managing WordPress at scale.

content.title: Kinsta Logs Record Year as Top Choice for Serious WordPress Businesses, With 60% Customer Growth, New Executive Hires and a Platform Buildout
content.summary: LOS ANGELES, March 31, 2026--Kinsta, a leading managed hosting provider for WordPress, today announced milestones in a record year for the company. Building on its recent recognition as the #1 web hosting platform in G2’s 2026 Best Software Awards, Kinsta saw more than 60% customer growth year-over-year, made two senior executive hires, expanded its partner programs and made significant platform improvements for agencies and enterprise teams managing WordPress at scale.
